examples.title: E-Waste Collection and Processing Algorithm
examples.description: Algorithm showing the step-by-step process of e-waste handling from collection to recycling
examples.code:
PROCEDURE EwasteManagement
BEGIN
 PRINT "E-Waste Management Process"
 
 // Step 1: Collection
 consumer_drop_off(electronic_device)
 collection_center_receives(device)
 collection_center_records(device_details)
 
 // Step 2: Categorization
 category = categorize(device)
 hazardous_check = identify_hazardous_components(category)
 
 // Step 3: Dismantling
 IF authorized_dismantler THEN
 components = dismantle(device)
 separate_components(components)
 extract_hazardous_materials(hazardous_check)
 ELSE
 PRINT "Unauthorized - Send to authorized facility"
 ENDIF
 
 // Step 4: Recycling
 FOR each recyclable_component DO
 material = process_material(component)
 send_to_manufacturer(material)
 ENDFOR
 
 // Step 5: Disposal
 FOR each hazardous_material DO
 safe_disposal(hazardous_material)
 ENDFOR
 
 PRINT "E-Waste processing complete"
END
examples.explanation: This algorithm demonstrates the complete e-waste management process including collection, categorization, dismantling, recycling, and safe disposal of hazardous materials as per E-Waste Rules 2011.
examples.timeComplexity: O(n) where n is number of components
examples.spaceComplexity: O(m) where m is storage for e-waste records

examples.title: EPR Target Calculation
examples.description: Algorithm to calculate and track producer's EPR targets for e-waste collection
examples.code:
// EPR Target Calculation for Producers

PROCEDURE CalculateEPRTarget
INPUT: products_sold, previous_year_collection, recycling_rate
OUTPUT: target_achieved

CONSTANTS:
 COLLECTION_TARGET_PERCENT = 30 // 30% collection target
 RECYCLING_TARGET_PERCENT = 70 // 70% recycling efficiency

BEGIN
 // Calculate collection target based on products sold
 collection_target = products_sold * (COLLECTION_TARGET_PERCENT / 100)
 
 // Calculate actual collection
 actual_collection = previous_year_collection
 
 // Check if target achieved
 IF actual_collection >= collection_target THEN
 target_achieved = TRUE
 PRINT "EPR Collection Target Met"
 ELSE
 target_achieved = FALSE
 short_fall = collection_target - actual_collection
 PRINT "Target not met. Shortfall: " + short_fall
 ENDIF
 
 // Calculate recycling efficiency
 recycled_amount = actual_collection * (recycling_rate / 100)
 
 IF recycled_amount >= (collection_target * RECYCLING_TARGET_PERCENT / 100) THEN
 PRINT "Recycling Target Achieved"
 ELSE
 PRINT "Recycling Target Not Met"
 ENDIF
 
 RETURN target_achieved
END
examples.explanation: This algorithm helps producers calculate and track their Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) targets for e-waste collection and recycling as mandated by the rules.
